👋 *Welcome to Fintrak!*

*Log expenses:*
📸 Send a receipt photo → auto-extracted
✍️ Type: `250 starbucks coffee`
💼 Business: `b:500 vendor xyz`
💳 Method first: `cash 300 lunch`

*Commands:*
/summary — this month totals
/report — breakdown by category
/search keyword — find expenses
/help — show this message
